game.title: Luxor of Cleopatra
game.payMechanic: 1024 ways-to-win (adjacent reels left-to-right, no fixed paylines)

paytable.notes: All 6 info/paytable pages opened and screenshotted individually before advancing. Verbatim per-symbol payout multiplier tables were visible on-screen but not retained in this summary due to a mid-session context compaction; exact values are recoverable only from the saved screenshot images, not from this JSON.

wildMultiplier.symbol: same pyramid glyph with 'x2+' badge, labeled WILD MULTIPLIER
wildMultiplier.multiplierStacking: paytable text states multiple WILD MULTIPLIER symbols in one winning combo multiply together, but a single win combining two+ WILD MULTIPLIERs simultaneously was not directly witnessed this session

baseSpin.details: Standard single-resolution reel spin, ~1-2s spin time normal speed / near-instant with Turbo Spin enabled. Win presented as amount + winning symbol count + 'PAYS $X' line under the reels. No-win boards also observed (screenshot 02).

cascade.notes: Confirmed absent: paytable text contains no cascade/tumble mechanic description, and every resolved board (base game and free spins) showed a single static resolution with no reel-clearing/refill animation.

buyFeature.details: Confirmation modal (screenshot 03-buy-feature-modal.png) shows purchase price and guarantees exactly 3 scatter symbols land, immediately triggering the free spins intro sequence. Purchased once successfully this session; resulting round awarded 10 free spins, vault reached $50.00 at 13/20 positions marked, round total win $27.00 (forfeited vault).

freeSpins.triggerCondition: 3+ scatter (lotus flower) symbols anywhere on the board
freeSpins.retriggerNote: No scatter retrigger (additional scatters landing while already inside a free-spins round) was observed across 6 total free-spins rounds played (1 bought + 5 natural).

roundsPlayed.notes: Contained the biggest single win of the session, $83.81, presented with the 'SENSATIONAL!' win-tier banner.

roundsPlayed.vaultReached: unobserved (outro missed due to turbo-speed autoplay)
roundsPlayed.roundTotalWin: ~$191.90 (inferred from credit delta, not from an outro screen)

roundsPlayed.vaultReached: $170.00, last confirmed fraction 19/20 before final spin
roundsPlayed.vaultCompleted: ambiguous - no distinct vault-completion payout screen appeared and round total win ($62.20) was far below the $170.00 vault value, implying forfeiture, but the exact final fraction on the last spin was not directly confirmed
roundsPlayed.notes: Contained a 'NICE!' win-tier moment ($11.47 base / $15.07 rolled-up total).

vaultFeature.description: 20-position accumulator board-marking meta-game active only during free spins. Certain symbol lands increment a dollar value and mark positions on a 20-slot board. Full 20/20 completion is required for payout; if the free-spins round ends with the board incomplete, the accumulated vault value is forfeited entirely.
vaultFeature.closestApproach: 19/20 with 1 spin remaining (seen twice), 18/20 with 3 spins remaining once
vaultFeature.notes: Across 6 rounds this session, the vault was never confirmed completed/paid. Genuinely difficult to complete within a standard 10-spin round without a retrigger, which itself was never observed.

multiplierApplication.order: WILD MULTIPLIER value applies to any winning combination it participates in as a substitute; multiple WILD MULTIPLIER symbols in the same combo are stated (paytable) to multiply together
multiplierApplication.largestSingleWinObserved: $83.81 (SENSATIONAL tier, within a free-spins round totalling $218.90)

winTiers.name: NICE
winTiers.observedContext: $11.47 base amount, winged-goddess artwork, sparkle particles, rolled up to $15.07 total

winTiers.name: SENSATIONAL!
winTiers.observedContext: $83.81 mid-roll-up win, winged goddess artwork with coin-shower particles and rolling counter

observations.winTiersNote: Only 2 distinct tiers were observed this session; the game likely has additional intermediate/higher tiers (e.g. between or above these) that were not triggered.

presentation.reelMotion: Fast vertical blur spin, snaps to rest per reel left-to-right with a slight bounce
presentation.anticipation: Scatter symbols glow/pulse and slow the remaining reels slightly when 2 scatters already visible on the board
presentation.winTierEscalation: Small wins: amount rolls up under the reels with no banner. Larger wins escalate to a full-screen tier banner (e.g. NICE, SENSATIONAL) with themed winged-Cleopatra/Isis artwork, particle bursts, and a counted roll-up of the dollar amount.
presentation.cascadeFeel: not applicable - no cascade mechanic present
presentation.multiplierFeel: WILD MULTIPLIER lands with a golden flash and an 'x2' badge overlay that persists visibly on the symbol through the win evaluation
presentation.symbolAnimation: Winning symbols glow gold and pulse in place; scatter symbols have a constant idle shimmer
presentation.ambient: Torch-lit Egyptian temple/palace background (base game) transitioning to a night desert/moonlit palace scene during free spins, with a large Cleopatra figure standing beside the reels throughout
presentation.transitions: Free-spins entry uses a full-screen Cleopatra portrait wipe transition (screenshot 04) followed by a 'CONGRATULATIONS! YOU HAVE WON 10 FREE SPINS' modal (screenshot 05); free-spins exit uses a 'CONGRATULATIONS! YOU HAVE WON $X IN 10 FREE SPINS' modal before returning to base game
presentation.juice: Golden light-ray burst plays behind the reel frame at the start of each free-spins round (screenshot 12); VAULT display and remaining-spins counter both use gilded Egyptian-motif frames

eventOrderSingleBaseSpin: 1. Player clicks SPIN (or autoplay triggers it)
2. Reels spin left to right, each stopping in sequence
4. Winning ways are evaluated and highlighted with a glow
5. Win amount rolls up under the reels (or a tier banner plays for larger wins)
7. Idle state resumes / next autoplay spin begins

wins.detail: 3x lotus scatter pays $2.00, screen also showed $0.83 combined line win
single spin, SENSATIONAL tier banner, WILD MULTIPLIER involved
round total containing the $83.81 SENSATIONAL win
single spin, WILD x2 landed on reel 1, vault at $75.00/10-20
single spin, vault unchanged at $75.00, 4 remaining spins
single spin, 4x Cleopatra symbol combo, vault advanced to 11/20
single spin, vault reached $95.00/15-20, this was also the round's final spin and total
single spin, WILD x2 landed, vault at 19/20 with 1 spin remaining
single spin, NICE win tier ($11.47 base), vault at $90.00
round total, vault reached $170.00 but forfeited (ambiguous final completion state)

anomalies: Verbatim per-symbol paytable payout multiplier tables were viewed on all 6 pages and screenshotted, but the exact numeric values were not retained in this session's working memory after a mid-session context compaction; refer to paytable-1.png through paytable-6.png for ground truth.

Turbo-speed autoplay repeatedly advanced multiple spins/rounds between manual screenshot calls, causing at least one free-spins outro screen to be missed entirely (round 4) and making some vault-fraction readings imprecise at the moment of round end (round 6, vault $170.00). The host's automatic 5-second background screen recording should be consulted to fill these gaps.
No scatter retrigger (extra scatters landing inside an already-active free-spins round) was observed in any of the 6 free-spins rounds played.

The VAULT accumulator feature was never observed reaching full completion (20/20) with a confirmed payout; closest approaches were 19/20 with 1 spin remaining (twice) and an ambiguous $170.00/19-20-or-possibly-20-20 case with no distinct completion banner.
The MAX WIN cap (12,500x bet) was not reached or observed.
Only 2 win-tier banner names (NICE, SENSATIONAL) were observed; the game likely has additional tiers not triggered this session.
A WILD MULTIPLIER value higher than x2 was never observed, and simultaneous multiplication of two+ WILD MULTIPLIER symbols within one winning combo was not directly witnessed.
